name: Wyndham Rewards Earner Premier Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 120,000 Wyndham Rewards points: 90,000 points after spending $6,000 in the first 120 days, plus 30,000 points after spending $750 on Hotels by Wyndham in the first 180 days.
notes: Premier offer corroborated by Wyndham/Barclays search-visible sources and secondary coverage; do not use the Earner Business official page as the Premier source.
Estimated value intentionally conservative because Wyndham adds a new 45,000-point top redemption tier on 2026-09-15.

earning_rates.notes: Eligible travel including gas, EV charging, air, car rental, rideshare, tolls and trains.
Excluding Vacation Club down payments per issuer press release.

other_benefits.name: 25% discount on free night redemptions
other_benefits.description: Premier card includes a 25% discount on free night redemptions; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Wyndham Rewards Insider membership
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Wyndham Rewards Insider membership; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Points Payback
other_benefits.description: Redeem points for statement credit via Points Payback; terms apply.

other_benefits.name: Points do not expire
other_benefits.description: Premier Card adds points that never expire, per Wyndham/Barclays launch announcement.

sources.notes: Wyndham official press release confirms distinct Premier Card, $395 annual fee, up to 120k offer and earning/benefit highlights.
Official Wyndham Rewards redemption tier update effective 2026-09-15; relevant to point-value caveat.

application_rules.notes: New premium Wyndham/Barclays product; confirm Barclays eligibility language before displaying approval rules.

notes: Dedicated new premium product confirmed distinct from Earner Plus and Earner Business. Wyndham award chart changes effective 2026-09-15 add a 45,000-point top tier; keep valuation conservative and show caveat.
